do_not_merge.reason: Different entity_type (role vs office) contradicts merge per Test 1 (Contradiction test). The shared name 'Chief Safety Officer' is insufficient to override the strong identity field difference.

weak_aliases.reason: Shared alias with the other record, but not authoritative due to entity_type conflict.
Shared alias with the other record, but not authoritative due to entity_type conflict.

suggested_rules: entity_type is a strong identity field; even identical names cannot override a difference in entity_type (role vs office).
suggestion.rationale: Test 1 applies: entity_type differs (role vs office), forcing do_not_merge. The shared entity_name is only a weak alias.
